sqlMap.select: select Address1, Address2, Zip, WorkPhone, MobilePhone, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CountyDesc, CountryDesc, City, IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails, IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl, IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons, IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices from FirmNewApp
sqlMap.update:
update FirmNewApp set
Address1 = #Address1# Address1 = null Address2 = #Address2# Address2 = null Zip = #Zip# Zip = null WorkPhone = #WorkPhone# WorkPhone = null MobilePhone = #MobilePhone# MobilePhone = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null CountyDesc = #CountyDesc# CountyDesc = null CountryDesc = #CountryDesc# CountryDesc = null City = #City# City = null IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest = #IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest# IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest = null PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate = #PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate# PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate = null PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails = #PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails# PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails = null IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl = #IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl# IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl = null IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability = #IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability# IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability = null AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates = #AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates# AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates = null AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons = #AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons# AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons = null IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices = #IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices# IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices = null
sqlMap.select: select Address1, Address2, Zip, WorkPhone, MobilePhone, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CountyDesc, CountryDesc, City, IsPersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvest, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDate, PersonnelBeSubOfAnyInvestDetails, IsLawyerProfLiabClaimAgntAppl, IsAttorneyDeclineForProfLiability, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityDates, AttorneyDeclineForProfLiabilityReasons, IsApplicantProvidesLegalServices from FirmNewApp
